description:
# SimpleWorldEdit
A simple worldedit plugin for PowerNukkitX

Commands:
- /position [first/second] - Sets a position of your selection (Alias //1, //2)
- /biome [biome] - Changes the biome in your selection.
- /clipboard [clear/select] <count/index> - Clears your clipboard or switches to a different entry.
- /copy - Copies your selection to your clipboard.
- /expand [up/down/north/east/south/west/vert] <amount> - Expands your selection.
- /floodfill [block] <maxRadius> - Fills empty spaces with a block.
- /paste <position> - Pastes your selected clipboard entry.
- /replace [block] <replacement> - Replaces blocks in your selection.
- /rotate [rotation] - Rotates your selected clipboard entry.
- /set [block] - Fills your selection with a block.
- /structure [load/save] [name] - Save or load structures.
- /undo <amount> - Undo your latest block changes.
name: SimpleWorldEdit

versions.changelog:
This is the first release of SimpleWorldEdit.
It was made because of the FAWE issues.
versions.name: SimpleWorldEdit
